challenges.title: Script Tags
challenges.description: Create HTML with two script elements: one external script tag with a src attribute, and one inline script tag containing JavaScript code. Assign your HTML to the variable `html`.
challenges.test_code:
assert html.lower().count('<script') >= 2, 'Should contain at least 2 <script> elements'
assert html.lower().count('</script>') >= 2, 'Should close both <script> elements'
import re
scripts_with_src = re.findall(r'<script[^>]+src=', html.lower())
assert len(scripts_with_src) >= 1, 'At least one script should have a src attribute'
scripts = re.findall(r'<script(?![^>]*src=)[^>]*>(.*?)</script>', html.lower(), re.DOTALL)
has_inline = any(s.strip() for s in scripts)
assert has_inline, 'At least one script should contain inline JavaScript code'

challenges.title: Async Loading
challenges.description: Create HTML with three script tags: one with the async attribute, one with the defer attribute, and one regular script (no async or defer). All three should have src attributes. Assign your HTML to the variable `html`.
challenges.test_code:
assert html.lower().count('<script') >= 3, 'Should contain at least 3 <script> elements'
import re
assert re.search(r'<script[^>]+async', html.lower()), 'Should have a script with the async attribute'
assert re.search(r'<script[^>]+defer', html.lower()), 'Should have a script with the defer attribute'
assert html.lower().count('src=') >= 3, 'All three scripts should have src attributes'
scripts = re.findall(r'<script[^>]*>', html.lower())
has_plain = any('src=' in s and 'async' not in s and 'defer' not in s for s in scripts)
assert has_plain, 'Should have at least one regular script without async or defer'
hints: async loads and executes the script as soon as it's available
defer waits until the page is fully parsed before executing
A regular script blocks page rendering until it loads and executes
